postprocessing.disclaimer_text: Preliminary AI screen — not a diagnosis. Radiologist review required.

safety.rationale: Never leave the medic with an empty silence; always emit a report — even 'no flagged findings' — so it's clear Quick scan ran.

notes: Per Rev-8: raw_output_text is archived verbatim in ingestion_llm_response events; replay never re-invokes Gemini Flash.
Per Rev-6: this Bundle is the M10 swap-in point — backend_kind changes from gemini_flash_quick_scan to remote_monai_vista3d when inference companion ships.
